---
title: "MXiao0912.github.io"
---

Hi there! I'm Mingmei and I'm currently a PhD student from University of Cambridge specializing in Financial Econometrics and Empirical Asset Pricing. My research interests include Exchange Traded Funds market microstructure, forecast reconciliation, and dynamic panel data methods. Outside of work, I enjoy cooking and playing the guitar.

```{r}
1 + 1
```
